message:
fix: depth-aware non-interactive guidance — coordinator gets delegation prompt

Root cause: nonInteractiveGuidance() was appended to ALL sessions in eval mode,
including the coordinator (depth 0). It contained "Start coding within your
first 3 tool calls" and "You are both the implementer and the decision-maker"
— directly contradicting the coordinator's delegation workflow in base.md.

Fix: Split guidance by depth. Coordinator (depth 0) now gets:
  "You MUST decompose the task and delegate to subagents"
  "Within your first 5 tool calls, explore and start spawning implementers"
Subagents (depth > 0) still get: "Start coding within your first 3 tool calls"

Tests: Added TestNonInteractive_CoordinatorDoesNotGetCodingGuidance and
TestNonInteractive_SubagentGetsCodingGuidance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
